summary: Tested 4 P0 validation and checkout fixes: (1) Block subscription creation for deleted customers, (2) Block negative product prices, (3) ShowcaseLayout isEnquiry fix for enquiry products, (4) Price > 0 validation for Scope Final Won resources. All 8 backend tests and 8 frontend tests pass.
action_items: MINOR: ShowcaseLayout isEnquiry condition `&& product?.base_price == null` only works when base_price is truly null/undefined. Products created via the admin API default to base_price=0.0 (from AdminProductCreate model). The isEnquiry condition will be false for those products even with pricing_type='enquiry'. Consider changing condition to: `(isRFQ || pricing?.is_enquiry || product.pricing_type === 'enquiry') && (product?.base_price == null || product?.base_price === 0)` OR remove the base_price == null requirement when pricing_type === 'enquiry'.
critical_code_review_comments: ShowcaseLayout.tsx line 40: `const isEnquiry = (...) && product?.base_price == null` - this condition fails for enquiry products created via admin API where base_price defaults to 0.0. The test product needed a manual MongoDB $unset to set base_price=null. Real-world usage may be affected.
seed_data_creation: Created test product (id: 3f5cf83d-c427-4ff7-ac18-4684830c55fd) with showcase layout + enquiry pricing + base_price=null (via MongoDB $unset) for frontend showcase test. Created deleted test customer via admin API + MongoDB $set for subscription validation test. Test resources and products created/deleted during backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 P0 fixes fully verified: (1) backend 400 + frontend datalist filter for deleted customers in subscriptions, (2) backend 422 for negative product prices + frontend min=0 on price input, (3) ShowcaseLayout shows 'Request Quote' + ScopeIdBlock for enquiry products (requires base_price=null), (4) backend 400 + frontend toast error for Scope Final Won with price<=0. Admin login URL: /login?tenant=automate-accounts. Admin tabs use URL param ?tab=. SHOWCASE test product (id: 3f5cf83d-c427-4ff7-ac18-4684830c55fd) is in DB with base_price=null for future reference.

backend_test_results.TestSubscriptionDeletedCustomer: PASS - POST /api/admin/subscriptions/manual returns 400 with 'Cannot create a subscription for a deleted customer.' for deleted customers
backend_test_results.TestScopeFinalWonPrice::test_scope_final: PASS - POST /api/resources with Scope-Final-Won price=0 returns 400
PASS - POST /api/resources with Scope-Final-Won price=-5 returns 400
PASS - POST /api/resources with Scope-Final-Won price=100 returns 200/201

frontend_test_results.TEST 2 - Product price input min=0: PASS - [data-testid='pf-price'] has min='0' (visible after clicking Pricing tab)
frontend_test_results.TEST 3 - Subscriptions datalist filters: PASS - datalist #manual-sub-customers has 2 options, no deleted customer TEST_deleted_cust_*
frontend_test_results.TEST 6 - Resource price=0 validation toa: PASS - Toast shows 'Price must be greater than 0 for Scope - Final resources'
